memberdef.name: arma_applier_1
memberdef.initializer: {\ uword i,j;\ \ for(i=0, j=1; j<n_elem; i+=2, j+=2)\ {\ eT tmp_i = P1[i];\ eT tmp_j = P1[j];\ \ tmp_i operatorB##= P2[i];\ tmp_j operatorB##= P2[j];\ \ out_mem[i] operatorA tmp_i;\ out_mem[j] operatorA tmp_j;\ }\ \ if(i < n_elem)\ {\ out_mem[i] operatorA P1[i] operatorB P2[i];\ }\ }

memberdef.name: arma_applier_2
memberdef.initializer: {\ uword count = 0;\ \ for(uword col=0; col<n_cols; ++col)\ {\ uword i,j;\ \ for(i=0, j=1; j<n_rows; i+=2, j+=2, count+=2)\ {\ eT tmp_i = P1.at(i,col);\ eT tmp_j = P1.at(j,col);\ \ tmp_i operatorB##= P2.at(i,col);\ tmp_j operatorB##= P2.at(j,col);\ \ out_mem[count ] operatorA tmp_i;\ out_mem[count+1] operatorA tmp_j;\ }\ \ if(i < n_rows)\ {\ out_mem[count] operatorA P1.at(i,col) operatorB P2.at(i,col);\ ++count;\ }\ }\ }

memberdef.name: arma_applier_3
memberdef.initializer: {\ uword count = 0;\ \ for(uword slice=0; slice<n_slices; ++slice)\ {\ for(uword col=0; col<n_cols; ++col)\ {\ uword i,j;\ \ for(i=0, j=1; j<n_rows; i+=2, j+=2, count+=2)\ {\ eT tmp_i = P1.at(i,col,slice);\ eT tmp_j = P1.at(j,col,slice);\ \ tmp_i operatorB##= P2.at(i,col,slice);\ tmp_j operatorB##= P2.at(j,col,slice);\ \ out_mem[count ] operatorA tmp_i;\ out_mem[count+1] operatorA tmp_j;\ }\ \ if(i < n_rows)\ {\ out_mem[count] operatorA P1.at(i,col,slice) operatorB P2.at(i,col,slice);\ ++count;\ }\ }\ }\ }
